what_it_does: This file is a metadata attachment record that associates the attachment identifier att-531a0367 in the dragnet-development channel with the board item item-98dfa557 via a board:// URI, and records when it was added.
observations: The file consists only of YAML frontmatter with no additional body content.
The attachment id att-531a0367 matches the filename stem.
The target is a board:// URI pointing to item-98dfa557.
The added timestamp is an ISO 8601 value with timezone offset.
standouts: The target uses a board:// URI scheme to reference a board item.
The file is a typed, timestamped link rather than a content payload.
The attachment id in the metadata matches the file name.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter delimited by triple dashes.
Identifier in the file matches the filename.
References an external entity with a URI-style identifier.
Records creation time as an ISO 8601 timestamp with explicit timezone.
concerns: No payload or content is included beyond the metadata pointer.
The referenced board item is not present or described in this file.
No author or source context is recorded.
notes: A bare channel-to-board attachment index entry that records a typed pointer and timestamp but no attached content.
questions: What content or artifact is this attachment supposed to represent?
What is the nature or title of board item item-98dfa557?
Why was this attachment created at the recorded time?
purpose_vs_actual: No explicit purpose is stated; the file acts as a typed, timestamped pointer to a board item rather than carrying content.
intention_signals: To create a discoverable, time-stamped association between a channel attachment and a specific board item in the dragnet-development channel.
novelty: Use of a board:// URI scheme to reference a target board item within an otherwise conventional YAML metadata record.
contribution: It contributes a typed, timestamped edge between a channel attachment identity and a board item identity, supporting lookup and provenance without embedding payload data.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter channel attachment record linking attachment att-531a0367 in dragnet-development to board item item-98dfa557 with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To register a timestamped board-item attachment reference within a channel.
